decks.description: A go-wide token and equipment strategy leveraging legendary knights with powerful artifacts and enchantments to create an aggressive midrange deck.
This deck focuses on crewing vehicles through small creatures and enchantments that grant evasion. It plays efficient creatures and artifacts that synergize with vehicle mechanics.
A creature-heavy deck focused on enchantments, with creatures that trigger off enchantment synergies and various auras to maximize value.
An enchantment-focused deck with creatures that benefit from playing auras, generating value through token creation and constellation triggers.
Combat-focused deck with creatures that benefit from teamwork and instants that provide combat tricks and tactical advantages.
Combat-focused deck with veteran creatures that emphasize cooperative play and removal effects through instants.
A spirit-focused deck with evasive creatures and removal spells that generates value through spirits entering and leaving the battlefield.
A spirit-heavy deck that creates tokens and generates recurring value through spirit-producing creatures and sorceries.
Lifegain-focused deck with angels and clerics that gain life and protect your creatures with removal and recursion.
Angel-heavy lifegain deck featuring powerful legendary angels and strong creatures that generate value while gaining life.
Lifegain-oriented deck with angels and clerics that synergize with gaining life, supported by enchantments and artifact mana.
Lifegain synergy deck with clerics and creatures that reward gaining life, using enchantments for both ramp and removal.
Creature-focused with board control via enchantment-based removal and white combat tricks.
Patrol creatures with protective enchantments and tactical removal spells for board control.
Features Gideon planeswalker alongside patrol creatures and removal-focused enchantments for control.
Small efficient creatures with aura-based removal and creature tokens from Murder Investigation.
Aggressive cat-focused deck with efficient creatures and anthem effects that generate tokens and pump the team.
Cat-heavy deck with lynx creatures and land synergies, using Felidar Retreat to create a growing army of tokens.
Planeswalker-driven cat deck with Ajani creating lifegain synergies and growing the board with Ajani's Pridemate.
Aggressive cat army with creatures that create multiple tokens, supported by combat tricks and equipment.
A creature-focused deck that uses flickering effects to repeatedly trigger enter-the-battlefield abilities for card advantage and value.
A blink-focused deck using flickering mechanics to maximize enter-the-battlefield triggers and value from creatures with relevant abilities.
A flickering deck that uses blink effects combined with creatures and enchantments to generate value through repeated enter-the-battlefield effects.
A flicker-themed deck that uses Panharmonicon and blink effects to double enter-the-battlefield triggers and generate card advantage.
A creature-focused deck with evasive shapeshifters and changelings that can copy and mimic opponents' threats, supported by blue control elements like bounce and countermagic.
A cold-focused deck with snow creatures and winter-themed effects that freeze and control the board. Features snow permanents and icy enchantments to lock down opponents.
Faerie-focused creature deck with evasion and bounce effects, disrupting opponents with instant-speed tricks and utility spells.
Evasive Faerie creatures with disruption and tempo effects, using bounce and temporary power reduction to control the board.
A spell-heavy deck focused on wizards and mentors with card advantage through tutoring and card draw effects.
A wizard-themed deck with value creatures and utility spells that draws cards and manages board state.
A spell-heavy blue deck focused on divination and card draw effects, with creatures that benefit from scrying and manipulation of the top of your deck.
A creature-focused blue deck with card draw and manipulation effects, leveraging creatures that benefit from scrying and deck manipulation.
A control-heavy deck with card draw engines and removal, using small evasive creatures and instant-speed tricks to manage the board.
A tempo-focused deck with evasive creatures, card draw, and utility spells designed to apply pressure while managing threats.
An interactive blue deck with instant-speed interaction and counterspells, using evasive creatures to finish opponents.
A creature-focused tempo deck with evasive fliers backed by card advantage and utility spells to maintain pressure.
A spell and artifact-heavy deck focused on clue tokens and information gathering through cards like Press for Answers, Jace's Scrutiny, and Magnifying Glass.
An artifact and card-draw focused deck that leverages artifacts and clue mechanics to draw cards and build board presence.
An artifact-heavy deck with creatures that benefit from artifacts and enchantments, featuring interactive elements like Hold for Questioning.
A clue and investigation-focused deck helmed by Tamiyo with creatures that investigate and artifacts like Tamiyo's Journal to maintain board control and gather information.
Evasive merfolk creatures with lord effects and lord-granting abilities, supported by removal and creature enhancement.
Merfolk lords and evasive creatures with lord synergies, using removal and tactical flying abilities.
Merfolk creatures with lord abilities and removal spells, focused on evasive tactical gameplay with creature removal.
Merfolk lords with lord effects and creature removal, building an aggressive evasive merfolk deck with flying.
Artifact-focused deck with creatures that interact with artifacts, featuring a planeswalker and multiple artifact cards for strategic plays.
Artifact-heavy deck with artifact creatures and equipment that work together to create a synergistic engine.
Artifact and token-focused deck that generates and enhances creatures through artifact synergies and thopter generation.
Creature-heavy artifact deck that focuses on creature tokens and duplication effects to build board presence.
Small creature-focused deck with evasion and utility creatures. Features Rat tribal creatures with utility removal spells for targeted control.
A sacrifice-heavy deck focused on creatures with death triggers and superstition-themed effects, including the key card Triskaidekaphobia.
Big demon creatures with removal spells to control the board and sacrifice effects for card advantage.
Big demon creatures with token generation and removal effects for board control and evasion.
A graveyard-focused deck that mills cards and utilizes creatures with graveyard synergies to generate value from the discard pile.
A graveyard-focused deck that mills cards and uses creatures with powerful graveyard mechanics to recur value and control the board.
A graveyard-focused deck that leverages creature deaths to trigger morbid effects and gain value from sacrifice outlets like Spawning Pit.
A creature-heavy deck that triggers morbid effects through sacrifice outlets and recurring creatures like Reassembling Skeleton to enable repeatable triggers.
A disruptive deck with life drain effects and creature removal, focused on punishing opponents while controlling the board with small threats.
A plague-themed aggro deck with evasive creatures and enchantments that trigger from creature deaths, building a grinding engine of small threats.
A sacrifice-heavy deck with multiple enchantments creating a web of death-triggered effects and creature removal engines.
A midrange deck with mana ramp through Dread Presence and multiple death-triggers, building synergy around sacrificed creatures and recurring threats.
Vampire-focused deck that gains life through creatures with lifelink and triggers, creating a grind-heavy control strategy with drain effects.
Vampire-based deck that drains opponents through lifelink and creature triggers while gaining incremental life advantage.
Vampire deck that combines lifelink creatures with death triggers and card draw effects to drain opponents while maintaining board presence.
Vampire-focused strategy that uses lifelink and death trigger effects to drain opponents while recurring threats through sacrifice synergies.

cards.title: Vito, Thorn of the Dusk Rose

decks.description: A zombie-focused deck with lord effects and graveyard synergies. Uses Lord of the Accursed and Necromancer's Stockpile to create a strong undead army.
A zombie-themed deck with Liliana planeswalker support and recursive threats. Combines graveyard filling and creature recruitment for a strong undead army.
A zombie token-heavy deck with Endless Ranks of the Dead providing exponential growth. Focuses on creating a growing zombie army through enchantment synergies.
A zombie lord deck with Liliana's Mastery providing anthem effects and Undead Augur creating card draw. Features aggressive zombie creatures with powerful enchantment support.
This deck focuses on creature sacrifice and pest tokens with graveyard synergies. It uses sacrificial outlets and creatures that benefit from death to generate value.
This deck is built around Phyrexian creatures and plague-themed mechanics, with regeneration and creature sacrifice elements. It creates a cycle of death and rebirth through Phyrexian recursion.
This deck emphasizes large creature synergies with pest and bug tokens. It plays creatures that scale well with graveyard interactions and removal spells.
This deck features multiple creature and token generators with sacrifice outlets, creating a swarm-based strategy. It leverages creatures that produce tokens and benefit from creature deaths.
Fast-paced aggressive deck with small creatures and direct damage spells to win quickly.
A damage-focused deck with creatures that punish opponents for being hit or creating triggered damage effects, combined with damage spells and enchantments that burn opponents down.
Big dragon creatures with a planeswalker payoff. The deck focuses on casting dragons and using dragon synergy cards.
Dragon-focused aggression with tribal synergies and artifact support. Features strong dragon lords and damage-dealing spells.
Focuses on creatures with cycling mechanics that trigger off discards and cycling, with damage-dealing payoffs from creatures like Flameblade Adept and Drannith Stinger.
A cycling-focused deck with damage triggers from Irencrag Pyromancer and Drannith Stinger, utilizing cycling outlets to fuel both card draw and direct damage.
Spell-heavy deck that synergizes with instants and sorceries to trigger effects like Young Pyromancer and Spellgorger Weird, generating value through cast triggers.
Spell-focused deck with creatures that reward spellcasting, building a tempo-based strategy with multiple instant and sorcery triggers.
A creature-heavy deck that generates treasure tokens through effects like Captain Lannery Storm and Rapacious Dragon to fuel aggressive plays.
A treasure-focused deck with creatures that generate and benefit from treasure tokens, enabling efficient resource generation and explosive plays.
A treasure-generating deck featuring high-impact creatures like Goldspan Dragon that create explosive advantage through treasure token production.
A treasure synergy deck with creatures that create and abuse treasure tokens, featuring utility creatures like Gleaming Barrier alongside treasure generators.
A spell-focused deck centered around Chandra cards with direct damage effects. Synergizes with cheap creatures that reward instant and sorcery spells.
A heavy sorcery-based burn deck that relies on efficient damage spells and creatures that benefit from spellcasting. Direct damage-focused strategy with card draw outlets.
An instant-heavy spell damage deck with creatures that benefit from casting spells at instant speed. Features versatile instant responses and draw effects.
A balanced burn and aggression deck mixing sorceries and instants with creatures that synergize with direct damage. Strong removal package with pinpoint burn spells.
A goblin-focused deck that generates token creatures and uses sacrifice outlets to deal damage through cards like Goblin Grenade and token-generating spells.
A goblin aggression deck with haste creatures and tribal synergies to rapidly overwhelm opponents with small, evasive goblin creatures.
A goblin deck built around Muxus and mass token generation, creating many goblin tokens to overwhelm the opponent.
A goblin-themed sacrifice deck that generates tokens and uses them to fuel goblin synergies and direct damage.
Aggressive small creatures with raid synergies and combat tricks. Features creatures that trigger Raid and enchantments that reward attacking.
Fast aggressive deck with raid creatures and artifact/enchantment synergies. Focuses on evasive attackers and card advantage.
Raid-focused aggressive deck with enchantment payoffs. Features creatures that benefit from attacking and combat rewards.
Aggressive raid creatures with multiple enchantment synergies. Rewards attacking and building up raid payoffs.
A creature-focused deck with efficient Eldrazi spawners and processors. Features mana acceleration through spawn tokens and colorless threats to overwhelm opponents.
A creature-focused deck featuring green primates with utility effects and ramp spells to support aggressive play.
A landfall-focused deck that generates value whenever lands enter the battlefield, creating tokens and growing creatures with landfall triggers.
A landfall deck with token generation and landfall payoffs that create multiple creatures and triggers as lands enter the battlefield.
A deck focused on Hydra creatures with +1/+1 counter synergies and growth effects to power up large threats.
A multi-headed Hydra-themed deck with creatures that grow through +1/+1 counters and enchantments to create a large board presence.
A deck focused on large creatures with mana acceleration and size-boosting spells to make already big creatures even larger for dominating the board.
A stompy deck packed with oversized creatures and removal spells to control the board while building toward casting massive beaters.
A creature-focused elf deck that generates value through multiple small elves and pumps them with instants and sorceries for combat advantage.
A creature-heavy elf deck built around synergistic elves with lords and tribal pump effects to overwhelm opponents.
An elf deck with strong lord effects and artifact synergies that pump the team and create multiple combat threats.
An elf deck featuring token generation and synergies that create additional creatures and grow the board exponentially.
A wolf-focused deck with planeswalker support that generates tokens and synergizes with werewolf creatures for aggressive gameplay.
A wolf deck built around creature tokens and recurring small wolf creatures with pump effects and removal.
A wolf token generation deck that uses enchantments and instants to create tokens and pump creatures for combat advantage.
A wolf aggression deck featuring efficient wolf creatures with pack synergies and aura-based pump effects.
A creature-focused deck with large, powerful green creatures that reward aggressive play through ferocious mechanics and combat-oriented enchantments.
A creature-heavy green deck with large creatures and combat-focused cards, featuring multiple ferocious creatures and combat tricks to dominate the battlefield.
A green creature deck packed with ferocious creatures and combat-focused sorceries that aim to overpower opponents with large threats.
A green creature-focused deck with several large ferocious creatures supported by combat tricks and an enchantment to generate value from big creatures.
A creature-heavy swarm deck focused on insects that benefit from graveyard interactions and token generation through Crawling Sensation.
An insect-focused deck with Zask as a lord, featuring creatures that interact well with graveyard mechanics and sacrifice synergies.
A graveyard-synergy insect deck with recursion threats like Deadbridge Goliath and Phantom Nantuko that grow stronger from the graveyard.
An insect swarm deck featuring Zask as a lord with instant-speed removal and graveyard synergies through Crawling Sensation and Relentless Pursuit.
Artifact-heavy control deck with colorless creatures and mana ramp through Urza lands, powered by planeswalker Karn Liberated.
